betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Catalytic Cracking Tower§f is a large multiblock structure for §badvanced petroleum refining§f. Breaks heavy hydrocarbons into lighter, more valuable products.

§eBenefits:§f
• §aBetter yields§f than basic refining
• Produces §bCracked Oil§f which gives better Refinery output
• Essential for maximizing crude oil value

§eRequirements:§f
• Requires §bNiobium§f components (from Coltan processing)
• High power consumption
• Significant infrastructure investment

§eProducts:§f
• Light hydrocarbons for fuel production
• Aromatic compounds for chemical synthesis
• Higher-value outputs than direct refining

§aTip:§f Process crude oil through the Cracking Tower §bbefore§f the Refinery for maximum yields.
